route_summary: The JFK to Heathrow business-class market is one of the strongest premium transatlantic corridors, where schedule quality, aircraft choice, and ground experience all matter.
This long-haul premium route rewards stronger airport flow, privacy, and overnight sleep support.
London to Dubai is one of the best-known premium medium-to-long-haul business-class corridors.
This premium Asia route is driven by aircraft quality, lounge standards, and long-haul sleep value.
